title: AllinOne
description: A modification that adds Biomes, structures, entities, minerals and much more!
body:
### BIG UPDATE. GO TRY IT OUT
Hello Everyone, I'm gonna tell you what this mod is going to offer, shortly.

## This mod adds 6 minerals;
(for now) Ruby, Topaz, Anthracite Coal, Malachite, Ematite and Green Sapphire.

All these minerals can be found in the overworld, except for the Malachite which can be found both in the overworld and in the Nether.

 A biome was added in the latest update:
 ## The Ebony Forest
 Go check the wood out! There are also very diverse structures generating in it, so be prepared for the worst...

## Many achievements 
can be achieved by crafting various tools and wearing pieces of armor.

## 4 new Entities: 2 Mobs and 2 Creatures

**The Stranded Hellenic Traveler**: A Hellenic Traveler teleported from its dimension in space and time

**The Stranded Hellenic Hoplomachus**: The Chief that controls the other Travelers. He's pretty strong and angry since he doesn't know where he is.

**2 Hellenic Citizens**: They don't have a purpose for now, they are useful for the next update ;)

 



This is all FOR NOW. See ya soon! :D

 

Other versions coming soon!


UPDATE: I STARTED AGAIN WORKING IN THIS PROJECT. I HAVE LOTS OF CONTENT TO ADD!

(JEI is suggested for recipes)

(It's not recommended to play the 1.16.5 and even worse the 1.12.2 version of the mod since they were the start of the mod and they are full of bugs and they don't represent the final version of the mod. Play the 1.20 version instead!)

Feel free to write a comment if you need help or if you simply have questions about the mod ;D

I'm currently drowning in coding but I'm full of will to understand some of it

All textures are the property of the author of the mod. Therefore it's not permitted to use them for other purposes.
